global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on a promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure payment service with a discount offer.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one oval and one rectangle, in a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Secure & simple' positioned centrally.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message that reads 'Built for peace of mind'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Book now' in bold, centered at the bottom.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge with a white background and '-30%' text, positioned near the call to action.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'NovaPay' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A decorative element consisting of additional abstract shapes in the background.

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: A bold white headline stating 'SALE' positioned at the top right corner.
elements.text_content: Secure simple Built for peace of mind 30% Book now

elements.label: Sale icon
elements.description: A small icon indicating a sale, positioned near the top of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element that does not fit into the other categories.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with bold colors, secure payment service, discount offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure simple Built for peace of mind 30% Book now, NovaPay, SALE
